summary.zh: 把 Anthropic 的 claude-code CLI 接成 ForgeaX Studio 的推理后端。插件声明能力清单与 Bus 入口,实际 runner spawn `claude --mode stream` 子进程,把 ChatEvent 流桥接到内部消息总线;支持流式输出、思考过程、工具调用、子 agent 与会话续接。在面板管理里认证并选用后,所有 agent 的推理请求都走它。
summary.en: Wires Anthropic's claude-code CLI in as a ForgeaX Studio reasoning backend. The plugin declares the capability list + Bus entry; the runner spawns `claude --mode stream` and bridges ChatEvent streams onto the internal bus, with streaming, thinking, tool calls, sub-agents and session resume. Once authenticated and selected in Admin, every agent's reasoning routes through it.

body.zh:
Runner:claude --mode stream
ChatEvent 流桥接到 Bus
本插件只声明 metadata + 入口
body.en:
Runner: claude --mode stream
Bridges ChatEvent streams to the Bus
Plugin declares metadata + entry only

body.zh:
流式 / 思考 / 工具调用 / 子 agent / 会话
模型:opus-4.7 / sonnet-4.6 / haiku-4.5
body.en:
streaming / thinking / tool calls / sub-agents / sessions
Models: opus-4.7 / sonnet-4.6 / haiku-4.5

body.zh: 面板管理 → CLI 后端 → 选择并认证 → 全局生效
body.en: Admin → CLI backends → pick & authenticate → applies globally
